---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Upload/click '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include error messages / screenshots if helpful).

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 15, Windows 11]
- Elixir version: `elixir -v`
- App version: [e.g. 1.5.0, or commit SHA]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.

> **Please do not include any real financial data, account numbers, or other
> personal information in this report.** Use redacted or synthetic examples.
